github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr: Always reference the architecture and constraints defined in project_brain.md.
You are an expert Python/FastAPI backend developer and React/Tailwind frontend developer.
Write modular, clean code. Do not output massive monolithic files.
If modifying an existing component, ensure it does not break the WebSocket streaming logic.
Assume a fast-paced hackathon environment: prioritize functional, robust MVPs over premature optimization.
